intro_p1: Cravings often feel powerful in the moment.
intro_p2: But most urges are temporary and fade with time.
intro_p3: If you wait just a little while, the craving usually becomes weaker.
intro_p4: Let's delay the urge and watch what happens.
choose_short_delay: Choose a short delay before acting on the urge.
observe_craving: During this time, simply observe the craving without reacting.
how_strong_now: How strong is the urge right now?
timer_instructions_p1: Before we start the timer, rate how strong the craving feels right now.
timer_instructions_p2: Tap the dots to show the intensity of the urge.
observe_body: Notice how the craving feels in your body.
urges_rise_fall: Urges rise and fall like waves.
observe_no_reaction: Watch the feeling without acting on it.
how_strong_after: How strong is the urge now?
check_p1: Take a moment to check in again.
check_p2: Did the craving stay the same, or did it change?
victory_p1: By waiting instead of reacting, you proved something important.
victory_p3: Each time you delay an urge, you build stronger self-control.
no_entries: No entries yet. Complete a delay to see your progress!
